lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Hello human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: I'm Dusuri. I specialise in unique minerals that can't be found on Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't be found on Gielinor? Where do they come from then?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: To be honest, we don't fully know. All we know is that they can be found within shooting stars.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shooting stars?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: That's right. They fall from the sky from time to time. They can be mined for the unique minerals that I specialise in.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: If you ever come across one, I'd be happy to trade you for any stardust you find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Good luck out there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes. I've seen those before.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Wonderful. If you ever get any stardust from them, I'd be happy to trade you for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Good luck out there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some here. Can we trade?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Not now, I'm afraid. Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Good luck out there.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Hello human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we trade?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Not now, I'm afraid. Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you sell?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: I have packs of gems and soft clay if they take your fancy. I also have some interesting star fragments that seem to be able to recolour certain metals.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Most notably, I have a unique ring that we found embedded within a star once. It seems to have magical properties that we don't fully understand. What we do know is that it can improve your skill while mining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about shooting stars?

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: Not a lot really. All I know is that they fall from the sky from time to time and that you can mine them.

lines.speaker: Dusuri
lines.text: If you want to know more, there's an observatory near Ardougne that you might want to visit. They've done some research into them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm off.
